name: @sheason/d-pi
description: Unified CLI entry point for D-Pi hub and peer

scripts.build: npm run build:web-ui && rspack build --config rspack.config.mjs && shx chmod +x dist/cli.cjs && node scripts/write-publish-package.mjs
scripts.prepare:publish: npm run clean && npm run build
scripts.pack:publish: npm run prepare:publish && cd dist && npm pack
scripts.publish:dry: npm run prepare:publish && cd dist && npm pack --dry-run
scripts.publish:dist: npm run prepare:publish && cd dist && npm publish --access public
scripts.prepublishOnly: npm run clean && npm run build

author: Mario Zechner
